notes: eq-intake (repo eq-solutions/eq-solves-intake) tuning, pre-baked, not via /commission. eq-intake is a pnpm-workspace LIBRARY with NO root package.json: the build lives in eq-platform/, so the gate is `pnpm -C eq-platform check:packages` (= schemas:lint && typecheck over `./packages/*` only), NOT `npm run check`. The gate is deliberately scoped to packages/*: apps/eq-shell + apps/eq-service are stale in-repo duplicates of their own repos with pre-existing typecheck errors (see #46/#49), so the broad `check` is red regardless of any packages change and would never let the fleet gate go green. `test` is intentionally OMITTED: `pnpm -r test` is unit-level but `test:integration` (@eq/ai) is a known-flaky integration suite; wiring tests as the fleet gate before a clean cycle is observed would make shipwright/muster thrash. Add `"test": "pnpm -C eq-platform test"` once a clean manual cycle is verified green. `run` is empty: eq-intake is a library with no dev server. autoMerge is false: unlike eq-service this repo is NOT auto-deployed (no netlify.toml/vercel.json at root), so there is no production-deploy rail risk, but autoMerge stays false for the trial until one manual cycle lands cleanly. publicIntake + lighthouse auto-dispatch are off (opt-in); manual /lighthouse still works. See .armada/SETUP-NOTES.md for the trial runbook and the CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT note required before arming crows-nest's /loop.
